column.name: MTPOS
column.description: Item category group from material master

column.name: UEPST
column.description: Item category of the higher-level item

column.name: PSTYV
column.description: Default item category for the document

column.name: PSTY1
column.description: Manual entries allowed for item category in the document

column.name: PSTY2
column.description: Manual entries allowed for item category in the document

column.name: PSTY3
column.description: Manual entries allowed for item category in the document

column.name: PSTY4
column.description: Manual entries allowed for item category in the document

column.name: PSTY5
column.description: Manual entries allowed for item category in the document

column.name: PSTY6
column.description: Manual entries allowed for item category in the document

column.name: PSTY7
column.description: Manual entries allowed for item category in the document

column.name: PSTY8
column.description: Manual entries allowed for item category in the document

column.name: PSTY9
column.description: Manual entries allowed for item category in the document

column.name: PSTY10
column.description: Manual entries allowed for item category in the document

column.name: PSTY11
column.description: Manual entries allowed for item category in the document

column.name: ERNAM
column.description: Name of Person Responsible for Creating the Object
